title: Eldritch Pacts
description: Sell your soul to eldritch entities in your pursuit of power
body:
Welcome to Eldritch Pacts, the mod allowing you to sell your soul to the devil in your quest for power!

This mod currently doesn't have a lot of content.

To start, craft a soul dagger with one blaze rod, two diamonds, and two netherite scraps. When you kill players with this, they will drop corrupt soul fragments which can be used to craft the Book of the Damned. Further information can be gathered either by testing things out or by using JEI.
